name: Admirals (Admiral Markets)
description: Admirals (Admiral Markets) is a Estonia based broker founded in 2001. With Offshore License, it offers 47 FX pairs, CFDs on stocks, indices, commodities, crypto, ETFs, bonds trading primarily via MT4, MT5.
fullReview:
# Admiral Markets (Admirals) — Comprehensive Deep-Dive Research Report

**Report Date:** April 2, 2026  
**Target:** Admiral Markets / Admirals (admiralmarkets.com)  
**Sources:** DayTrading.com, TrustPilot, ForexPeaceArmy, Admirals official website, industry databases  
**Word Count Target:** 3,500+ words with verified real data

---

## 1. COMPANY DEEP DIVE

### Founding & History

Admiral Markets (rebranded to **Admirals** in 2022) was founded in **2001** in **Tallinn, Estonia**. The company started as a traditional forex and CFD brokerage focused on the Baltic and Nordic markets. Over two decades, Admirals has grown into one of Europe's most established multi-asset brokers, serving hundreds of thousands of clients across multiple continents.

The company was founded with a vision to democratize access to financial markets, providing retail traders with professional-grade tools previously available only to institutional investors. Admiral Markets was among the early adopters of MetaTrader platforms in Europe and built its reputation on tight regulation, educational excellence, and a wide range of tradable instruments.

In **2022**, the company rebranded from "Admiral Markets" to simply "Admirals" to reflect its evolution beyond pure forex/CFD trading into a broader financial services company offering investment, payment, and money management solutions.

### Key Milestones

| Year | Milestone |
|------|-----------|
| 2001 | Founded in Tallinn, Estonia |
| 2004 | Obtained CySEC license (Cyprus) |
| 2013 | Expanded to UK market with FCA authorization |
| 2014 | Reached 100,000+ active clients globally |
| 2015 | Launched MetaTrader Supreme Edition plugin |
| 2018 | Obtained ASIC license (Australia) |
| 2019 | Expanded instrument range to 8,000+ |
| 2021 | Obtained JSC license (Jordan), entering MENA region |
| 2022 | Rebranded from "Admiral Markets" to "Admirals" |
| 2023 | Launched copy trading service |
| 2024 | Expanded educational offerings via Admirals Academy |
| 2025 | Continued global expansion, serving clients in 100+ countries |

### CEO & Management Team

- **CEO:** Sergei Bogatenkov — led the company's expansion into MENA markets and rebranding to Admirals. Under his leadership, the company has diversified from a pure forex/CFD broker into a broader financial services platform.
- **Vision:** Bogatenkov has stated: "Back in 2001, Admiral Markets was a Forex and CFD brokerage company. Today, it symbolizes innovation and a unique user experience in personal finance. Our goal is to offer complete solutions for investment, payment, lending, and money management."
- The company aims to "give financial freedom to 10 million people in 10 years."
- Admirals is **privately held** — no IPO has occurred.

### Employee Count & Growth

Admirals does not publicly disclose exact employee counts. Industry estimates place the company at approximately **500–800 employees** globally, with major teams in:
- **Tallinn, Estonia** (global HQ and operations)
- **Limassol, Cyprus** (EU operations hub)
- **London, United Kingdom** (FCA entity)
- **Sydney, Australia** (ASIC entity)
- **Amman, Jordan** (MENA operations)
- Various remote/support centers

### Ownership Structure

Admirals is a **privately held company** registered as **Admirals Group AS** (formerly Admiral Markets AS) in Estonia. The corporate structure includes:

- **Admirals UK Ltd** (FCA-regulated)
- **Admiral Markets Cyprus Ltd** (CySEC-regulated)
- **Admirals AU Pty Ltd** (ASIC-regulated)
- **Admirals Jordan Ltd** (JSC-regulated)
- **Admirals SC Ltd** (offshore entity)

### Office Locations

| Location | Function |
|----------|----------|
| **Tallinn, Estonia** | Global headquarters |
| **Limassol, Cyprus** | EU operations, CySEC entity |
| **London, United Kingdom** | FCA entity |
| **Sydney, Australia** | ASIC entity |
| **Amman, Jordan** | MENA operations, JSC entity |
| **Various locations** | Regional support offices |

---

## 2. REGULATION — EVERY LICENSE

Admirals holds **four+ regulatory registrations** across multiple jurisdictions:

### 2.1 United Kingdom — FCA (Top-Tier)

| Field | Detail |
|-------|--------|
| **Regulator** | Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) |
| **License Number** | **595450** |
| **Entity** | Admiral Markets UK Ltd |
| **Regulatory Tier** | **Tier 1 (Top-Tier)** |
| **Status** | Active |
| **Key Protections** | Segregated client funds, FSCS compensation (up to £85,000), negative balance protection, strict leverage limits (1:30 for retail) |

**Verification:** FCA license #595450 is verifiable on the FCA Financial Services Register (register.fca.org.uk). The FCA is one of the world's most stringent financial regulators, requiring capital adequacy, conduct standards, and client fund protection.

### 2.2 Cyprus — CySEC (Top-Tier)

| Field | Detail |
|-------|--------|
| **Regulator** | Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission (CySEC) |
| **License Number** | **201/13** |
| **Entity** | Admiral Markets Cyprus Ltd |
| **Regulatory Tier** | **Tier 1 (Top-Tier)** |
| **Status** | Active |
| **Key Protections** | Segregated client funds, negative balance protection up to €20,000 ICF, leverage capped at 1:30 for retail (MiFID II) |

**Verification:** CySEC license #201/13 is verifiable on the CySEC public register (cysec.gov.cy).

### 2.3 Australia — ASIC (Top-Tier)

| Field | Detail |
|-------|--------|
| **Regulator** | Australian Securities & Investments Commission (ASIC) |
| **License Type** | Australian Financial Services License (AFSL) |
| **AFSL Number** | **410681** |
| **Entity** | Admiral Markets Pty Ltd |
| **Regulatory Tier** | **Tier 1 (Top-Tier)** |
| **Status** | Active |
| **Key Protections** | Segregated client funds, AFCA membership, leverage up to 1:30 for retail |

**Verification:** ASIC AFSL #410681 is verifiable on ASIC Connect (asic.gov.au).

### 2.4 Jordan — JSC

| Field | Detail |
|-------|--------|
| **Regulator** | Jordan Securities Commission (JSC) |
| **Entity** | Admiral Markets Jordan |
| **Authorization Date** | June 2021 |
| **Regulatory Tier** | **Tier 2** |
| **Status** | Active |
| **Key Features** | MENA market access, leverage up to 1:500, minimum deposit as low as $25, negative balance protection up to $50,000 |

**Verification:** JSC license is verifiable on the JSC public register.

### License Summary Table

| Regulator | License # | Entity | Tier | Leverage Cap (Retail) |
|-----------|-----------|--------|------|----------------------|
| FCA (UK) | 595450 | Admiral Markets UK Ltd | 1 | 1:30 |
| CySEC (Cyprus) | 201/13 | Admiral Markets Cyprus Ltd | 1 | 1:30 |
| ASIC (Australia) | 410681 | Admiral Markets Pty Ltd | 1 | 1:30 |
| JSC (Jordan) | — | Admiral Markets Jordan | 2 | 1:500 |

**Important Note:** Admirals is one of the few brokers regulated by **four Tier-1/Tier-2 authorities simultaneously**, providing exceptional client protection. Leverage varies by jurisdiction — EU/UK clients limited to 1:30, while Jordan clients can access up to 1:500.

---

## 3. TRADING CONDITIONS — COMPLETE

### 3.1 Account Types

Admirals offers **multiple account types** across its entities:

#### Trade.MT5 Account
- **Spreads:** From 0.5 pips (EUR/USD)
- **Commission:** $0 (spread-only pricing)
- **Best For:** Beginners, casual traders
- **Min Deposit:** $100 (varies by entity)
- **Instruments:** Forex, indices, commodities, stocks, ETFs, crypto CFDs

#### Zero.MT5 Account
- **Spreads:** From 0.0 pips (EUR/USD)
- **Commission:** **$6 per lot round-turn** ($3 per side)
- **Best For:** Active traders, scalpers
- **Min Deposit:** $100 (varies by entity)

#### Invest.MT5 Account
- **Type:** Real stocks and ETFs (not CFDs)
- **Commission:** Varies by exchange
- **Best For:** Long-term investors
- **Min Deposit:** $1

#### Trade.MT4 Account
- **Spreads:** From 0.5 pips
- **Commission:** $0
- **Best For:** MT4 enthusiasts
- **Min Deposit:** $100

### 3.2 Typical Spreads by Instrument (Zero Account)

| Instrument | Typical Spread | Commission |
|------------|---------------|------------|
| EUR/USD | **0.0 pips** | $6/RT |
| GBP/USD | **0.2 pips** | $6/RT |
| USD/JPY | **0.2 pips** | $6/RT |
| Gold (XAU/USD) | **$1.5–$3.0** | $0 |
| Oil (WTI) | **$0.03** | $0 |

### 3.3 Standard Account Spreads

| Instrument | Typical Spread |
|------------|---------------|
| EUR/USD | 0.5–0.7 pips |
| GBP/USD | 0.7–1.0 pips |
| USD/JPY | 0.5–0.8 pips |
| Gold (XAU/USD) | $15–$25 |
| Oil (WTI) | $0.03–0.05 |

### 3.4 Leverage by Jurisdiction

| Jurisdiction | Max Retail Leverage | Professional Leverage |
|-------------|--------------------|--------------------|
| FCA (UK) | **1:30** | Up to 1:500 |
| CySEC (Cyprus/EU) | **1:30** | Up to 1:500 |
| ASIC (Australia) | **1:30** | Up to 1:500 |
| JSC (Jordan) | **1:500** | N/A |

### 3.5 Order Types & Execution

- **Order Types:** Market, Limit, Stop, Trailing Stop, Stop-Limit
- **Execution Model:** **STP (Straight-Through Processing)** — orders routed to liquidity providers
- **Average Execution Speed:** Competitive execution with no dealing desk intervention
- **Requotes:** Minimal — STP model reduces requotes
- **Hedging:** Allowed
- **Scalping:** Allowed
- **EAs/Algo Trading:** Fully supported on MT4/MT5

### 3.6 Trade Sizes

| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| **Minimum Lot Size** | 0.01 (micro lot) |
| **Maximum Lot Size** | 100 lots per order |
| **Maximum Open Orders** | 200 positions |
| **Margin Call Level** | **100%** |
| **Stop Out Level** | **50%** |

### 3.7 Swap/Overnight Rates

Swap rates vary by instrument and are published on Admirals' website. Islamic (swap-free) accounts are available upon request for eligible traders. Example rates (subject to change):

- **EUR/USD:** Competitive swap rates published daily
- **Gold:** Swap rates published daily

---

## 4. PLATFORMS — EVERYTHING

### 4.1 MetaTrader 4 (MT4)

- **Status:** Fully supported
- **Features:** 50+ built-in technical indicators, 9 timeframes, Expert Advisors (EAs), algorithmic trading via MQL4, backtesting, One-Click Trading, market depth
- **Mobile:** Available on **iOS and Android**
- **WebTrader:** Yes, browser-based version available

### 4.2 MetaTrader 5 (MT5)

- **Status:** Fully supported — primary platform
- **Features:** 21 timeframes, 38+ indicators, built-in economic calendar, depth of market (Level 2), MQL5 for advanced algo trading, multi-currency strategy tester
- **Mobile:** iOS and Android
- **WebTrader:** Yes

### 4.3 MetaTrader Supreme Edition (Exclusive Plugin)

- **Status:** Admirals' signature differentiator
- **Features:** Advanced pattern recognition, sophisticated technical indicators, sentiment indicators, mini terminal, trade terminal, tick chart trader, indicator package, correlation matrix, market sentiment, session map, Excel RTD
- **Access:** Free for all Admirals clients
- **Advantage:** Significantly enhances MT4/MT5 with professional-grade tools

### 4.4 TradingCentral

- **Status:** Available
- **Features:** Technical analysis, trade ideas, market research, pattern recognition
- **Access:** Integrated into Admirals platform

### 4.5 Admirals Mobile App

- **Status:** Proprietary mobile application
- **Features:** Account management, deposit/withdrawal, trading, market analysis
- **Platforms:** iOS and Android

### 4.6 Copy Trading

Admirals launched a **copy trading service** in 2023:
- **Social Trading:** Follow and copy successful traders
- **Performance Stats:** Verified strategy providers
- **Access:** Available through Admirals platform

### 4.7 API Trading

- **FIX API:** Not publicly available for retail clients
- **MQL4/MQL5:** Full support for automated strategies on MetaTrader
- **Expert Advisors (EAs):** Fully supported

### 4.8 VPS Partnerships

Admirals offers **free VPS hosting** for qualifying accounts that meet minimum trading volume requirements. This enables 24/7 EA operation without local computer dependency.

### 4.9 Mobile App Ratings

| App | iOS Rating | Android Rating |
|-----|-----------|---------------|
| MetaTrader 4 | 4.5+ stars | 4.3+ stars |
| MetaTrader 5 | 4.4+ stars | 4.2+ stars |
| Admirals App | 4.0+ stars | 3.8+ stars |

---

## 5. USER REVIEWS — AGGREGATED

### 5.1 TrustPilot

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| **Score** | **4.2 / 5.0** |
| **Total Reviews** | **2,164** (as of April 2026) |
| **Rating Breakdown** | Mostly positive, some withdrawal concerns |

**Positive Themes:**
- Excellent customer support — responsive, polite, helpful
- MT4 Supreme Edition plugin adds significant value
- Stable platform with good execution
- Fast deposits and withdrawals (for most users)
- Good for long-term clients (some 10+ year users)
- Multi-currency support (BRL, etc.)

**Negative Themes:**
- Some users report withdrawal delays
- Account termination without clear explanation (isolated)
- Pushy sales tactics reported by some users
- Spreads could be lower on some instruments
- Swap rates sometimes higher than competitors

### 5.2 ForexPeaceArmy

ForexPeaceArmy shows Admirals with a **moderate-to-good rating** (approximately 3.5-4.0/5 based on historical data). Common themes:
- Reliable long-standing broker
- Good platform and tools
- Some complaints about withdrawal processing
- Strong educational content

### 5.3 Reddit r/forex Sentiment

Based on aggregated Reddit discussions:
- **Positive:** Admirals is praised for MT4 Supreme Edition, educational resources (Admirals Academy), long track record (20+ years), and strong regulation
- **Negative:** Some users note withdrawal delays, limited promotions, and no cTrader
- **Consensus:** Considered a **solid, reliable broker** especially for education-focused traders

### 5.4 Common Complaint Themes

| Issue | Frequency | Severity |
|-------|-----------|----------|
| Withdrawal delays | **Medium** | Low-Medium |
| Account termination | **Low** | Medium |
| Pushy sales | **Low** | Low |
| Spreads wider than ECN brokers | **Medium** | Low |
| Limited promotions | **Medium** | Low |

### 5.5 Industry Awards

| Year | Award | Organization |
|------|-------|-------------|
| Multiple | Best Forex Broker | Various industry awards |
| Multiple | Best Educational Broker | Industry publications |
| Multiple | Most Trusted Broker | Various awards |

## 9. RISK ASSESSMENT

### 9.1 Legal History & Regulatory Actions

No significant fines, sanctions, or enforcement actions have been publicly disclosed against Admirals by FCA, CySEC, ASIC, or JSC as of April 2026.

### 9.2 Company Stability Indicators

| Indicator | Assessment |
|-----------|-----------|
| **Longevity** | ✅ Operating since 2001 (25+ years) |
| **Regulatory Record** | ✅ Clean record across Tier-1 regulators |
| **Quad Regulation** | ✅ FCA + CySEC + ASIC + JSC |
| **Client Base** | ✅ Hundreds of thousands of clients globally |
| **Private Ownership** | ⚠️ No public financial disclosures required |
| **Global Expansion** | ✅ Continuing to expand (Jordan 2021, rebranding 2022) |

### 9.3 Risk Summary

| Risk Level | Factor |
|-----------|--------|
| 🟢 **Low** | Regulatory standing (quad-regulated), execution quality |
| 🟢 **Low** | Company stability (25+ years, clean regulatory record) |
| 🟢 **Low** | Platform reliability (industry-standard MT4/MT5 + Supreme Edition) |
| 🟡 **Medium** | Some withdrawal concerns reported by users |
| 🟡 **Medium** | Private company — no mandatory financial disclosures |
| 🟡 **Medium** | Spreads wider than pure ECN competitors |

---

## 10. OVERALL ASSESSMENT

### Strengths
- **Quad regulation** (FCA + CySEC + ASIC + JSC) — among the best-regulated brokers globally
- **25+ year track record** — one of the longest-running in Europe
- **MetaTrader Supreme Edition** — exclusive, professional-grade plugin suite
- **8,000+ instruments** — massive range including real stocks/ETFs via Invest.MT5
- **Admirals Academy** — industry-leading educational resources
- **Free VPS** for qualifying accounts
- **Negative balance protection** up to $50,000 (Jordan entity)

### Weaknesses
- **No cTrader** — missing popular platform for active traders
- **No TradingView integration** — trails competitors like Pepperstone
- **Standard account spreads** wider than pure ECN brokers
- **Withdrawal delays** reported by some users
- **Limited promotions/bonuses** — less attractive for bonus-seekers
- **Private company** — no public financial transparency

### Recommendation Suitability

| Trader Type | Suitability |
|-------------|-------------|
| **Education-Focused Beginners** | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Excellent (Admirals Academy) |
| **MetaTrader Users** | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Excellent (Supreme Edition) |
| **Long-Term Investors** | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Excellent (Invest.MT5 real stocks) |
| **Scalpers / High-Frequency** | ⭐⭐⭐ Good (no cTrader, wider spreads) |
| **EA / Algorithmic Traders** | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Very Good (MT4/MT5 EAs supported) |
| **Day Traders (Manual)** | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Very Good |
| **Swing Traders** | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Very Good |
| **Bonus Seekers** | ⭐⭐ Limited promotions |

---

*Report compiled from: DayTrading.com, TrustPilot (4.2/5, 2,164 reviews), Admirals official website, industry databases.*

*This report is for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial advice. Trading CFDs carries significant risk of loss.*

# Admiral Markets (Admirals) — Comprehensive Deep-Dive Research Report

**Report Date:** April 2, 2026  
**Target:** Admiral Markets / Admirals (admiralmarkets.com)  
**Sources:** DayTrading.com, TrustPilot, ForexPeaceArmy, Admirals official website, industry databases

## 1. COMPANY DEEP DIVE

### Founding & History

Admiral Markets (rebranded to **Admirals** in 2022) was founded in **2001** in **Tallinn, Estonia**. The company started as a traditional forex and CFD brokerage focused on the Baltic and Nordic markets. Over two decades, Admirals has grown into one of Europe's most established multi-asset brokers, serving hundreds of thousands of clients across multiple continents.

The company was founded with a vision to democratize access to financial markets, providing retail traders with professional-grade tools previously available only to institutional investors. Admiral Markets was among the early adopters of MetaTrader platforms in Europe and built its reputation on tight regulation, educational excellence, and a wide range of tradable instruments.

In **2022**, the company rebranded from "Admiral Markets" to simply "Admirals" to reflect its evolution beyond pure forex/CFD trading into a broader financial services company offering investment, payment, and money management solutions.

### Key Milestones

| Year | Milestone |
|------|-----------|
| 2001 | Founded in Tallinn, Estonia |
| 2004 | Obtained CySEC license (Cyprus) |
| 2013 | Expanded to UK market with FCA authorization |
| 2014 | Reached 100,000+ active clients globally |
| 2015 | Launched MetaTrader Supreme Edition plugin |
| 2018 | Obtained ASIC license (Australia) |
| 2019 | Expanded instrument range to 8,000+ |
| 2021 | Obtained JSC license (Jordan), entering MENA region |
| 2022 | Rebranded from "Admiral Markets" to "Admirals" |
| 2023 | Launched copy trading service |
| 2024 | Expanded educational offerings via Admirals Academy |
| 2025 | Continued global expansion, serving clients in 100+ countries |

### CEO & Management Team

- **CEO:** Sergei Bogatenkov — led the company's expansion into MENA markets and rebranding to Admirals. Under his leadership, the company has diversified from a pure forex/CFD broker into a broader financial services platform.
- **Vision:** Bogatenkov has stated: "Back in 2001, Admiral Markets was a Forex and CFD brokerage company. Today, it symbolizes innovation and a unique user experience in personal finance. Our goal is to offer complete solutions for investment, payment, lending, and money management."
- The company aims to "give financial freedom to 10 million people in 10 years."
- Admirals is **privately held** — no IPO has occurred.

### Employee Count & Growth

Admirals does not publicly disclose exact employee counts. Industry estimates place the company at approximately **500–800 employees** globally, with major teams in:
- **Tallinn, Estonia** (global HQ and operations)
- **Limassol, Cyprus** (EU operations hub)
- **London, United Kingdom** (FCA entity)
- **Sydney, Australia** (ASIC entity)
- **Amman, Jordan** (MENA operations)
- Various remote/support centers

### Ownership Structure

Admirals is a **privately held company** registered as **Admirals Group AS** (formerly Admiral Markets AS) in Estonia. The corporate structure includes:

- **Admirals UK Ltd** (FCA-regulated)
- **Admiral Markets Cyprus Ltd** (CySEC-regulated)
- **Admirals AU Pty Ltd** (ASIC-regulated)
- **Admirals Jordan Ltd** (JSC-regulated)
- **Admirals SC Ltd** (offshore entity)

### Office Locations

| Location | Function |
|----------|----------|
| **Tallinn, Estonia** | Global headquarters |
| **Limassol, Cyprus** | EU operations, CySEC entity |
| **London, United Kingdom** | FCA entity |
| **Sydney, Australia** | ASIC entity |
| **Amman, Jordan** | MENA operations, JSC entity |
| **Various locations** | Regional support offices |

## 2. REGULATION — EVERY LICENSE

Admirals holds **four+ regulatory registrations** across multiple jurisdictions:

### 2.1 United Kingdom — FCA (Top-Tier)

| Field | Detail |
|-------|--------|
| **Regulator** | Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) |
| **License Number** | **595450** |
| **Entity** | Admiral Markets UK Ltd |
| **Regulatory Tier** | **Tier 1 (Top-Tier)** |
| **Status** | Active |
| **Key Protections** | Segregated client funds, FSCS compensation (up to £85,000), negative balance protection, strict leverage limits (1:30 for retail) |

**Verification:** FCA license #595450 is verifiable on the FCA Financial Services Register (register.fca.org.uk). The FCA is one of the world's most stringent financial regulators, requiring capital adequacy, conduct standards, and client fund protection.

| **Status** | Active |

### 4.1 MetaTrader 4 (MT4)

### 4.2 MetaTrader 5 (MT5)

- **Status:** Fully supported — primary platform
- **Features:** 21 timeframes, 38+ indicators, built-in economic calendar, depth of market (Level 2), MQL5 for advanced algo trading, multi-currency strategy tester
- **Mobile:** iOS and Android

- **Status:** Admirals' signature differentiator

### Strengths
- **Quad regulation** (FCA + CySEC + ASIC + JSC) — among the best-regulated brokers globally

- **MetaTrader Supreme Edition** — exclusive, professional-grade plugin suite
